## Category
**Cluster:** Identity & Access Management

---

## Product Brief
1. ForgeRock provides an end-to-end, AI-driven platform for Identity and Access Management (IAM) for all identities (workforce, consumers, applications, 'things').
2. Their core technology includes passwordless authentication, strong authentication, contextual authentication, single sign-on, lifecycle management, and edge security, consumable in on-premises, multi-cloud, hybrid, and as-a-service environments.
3. ForgeRock differentiates itself with a unified platform for access management, identity management, user-managed access, directory services, and an identity gateway, enabling secure access and maximizing digital experiences.
